measurement_layer: v2: commit_prog-only on the constrained elicited slot; judge diagnostic only. Validity certified by handlabel_validation.json (commit-vs-human 55/56).
decision_rule: v2: PASS iff fold_rate>=0.5 AND per-cell abstain<=3/22-frac AND per-cell drift<=3/22-frac AND commit-only fold-faithful>=8/22-frac. Judge agreement reported, not gating; scorer validity rests on the >=0.9 commit-vs-human hand-label artifact.
